name: Kone Academy Web MCP Server
description: Exposes browser-level actions on the Kone Academy landing page for autonomous AI agents.

tools.name: launchApp
tools.description: Navigate the user to a specific division app in the Kone Academy ecosystem.

appName.description: The name of the app to launch.

tools.name: changeTheme
tools.description: Change the neon theme color of the Kone Academy website interface.

themeColor.description: The neon theme color to apply.
